paras.text: Semester ka aakhri hafta tha. Dono apni final revision kar rahe the college ke garden me baithe, notes bikhre pade the.

paras.speaker: B
paras.text: Chalo ek game khelte hain — main sentence bologi, tum bataoge kaunsa grammar point hai.

paras.speaker: B
paras.text: 'You should have submitted the form earlier.'

paras.speaker: A
paras.text: Aasan hai — 'Should have', past ka pachtawa!

paras.speaker: B
paras.text: Sahi! Ab ye suno — 'If we hadn't met in that library, we wouldn't be sitting here today.'

paras.speaker: A
paras.text: (muskurate hue) Mixed Conditional — past cause, present result. Aur ye sentence bhi sach hai, waise.

paras.speaker: B
paras.text: (sharmate hue, jaldi topic badalte hue) Achha next — 'The teacher must have forgotten about the extra class.'

paras.speaker: A
paras.text: Must have — deduction, guess based on evidence! Ek aur do, ekdum last wala.

paras.speaker: B
paras.text: Theek hai, aakhri — 'If I get the scholarship, I will study abroad next year.'

paras.speaker: A
paras.text: Type 1, real future condition. (ruk ke) Ruko... ye sentence tumne bas revision ke liye banaya, ya sach me...

paras.speaker: B
paras.text: (notes band karte hue, seedha aankhon me dekhe bina) Actually {{A}}... mujhne scholarship ke liye apply kiya tha, kal hi result aaya. Selected ho gayi hoon. Doosre shehar ke college me.

paras.speaker: A
paras.text: (chup, kuch der ke liye kuch nahi bol paata) ...kab jaana hai?

paras.speaker: B
paras.text: Agle mahine se naya session shuru ho jayega wahan. (halki si udaasi ke sath muskurate hue) Pata nahi ab hum roz aise baithke grammar kaise seekhenge.
Interview hall ke bahar khadi ladki ne file kaska pakda, jaise us din ki yaad abhi bhi taaza thi — jab pehli baar doori ka ehsaas hua tha...

quiz.q: Mixed Recap — Correct the error: 'If she would have called earlier, we could have planned better.'
quiz.answer: If she had called earlier, we could have planned better.
quiz.explain: Type 3 Conditional me 'if' clause hamesha 'had + V3' leta hai, 'would have' sirf main clause me aata hai.

quiz.q: Mixed Recap — Fill: He is not picking up the phone. He ___ (be) busy right now. (guess, uncertain)
quiz.explain: Present ke baare me uncertain guess ke liye 'might/may + V1' use hota hai; agar past ke baare me hota to 'might have + V3'.

quiz.q: Mixed Recap — Which type of conditional is this: 'If I hadn't taken this course, I wouldn't have met such a good friend'?
quiz.explain: 'If' clause past unreal hai (hadn't taken), lekin result abhi present me hai (wouldn't have met describes a present state of friendship) — ye classic Mixed Conditional pattern hai.
